description: A public scratch-chat user prompt can be inspected for free and run as one private chat fork with source provenance, without creating a Request or debiting credits.

sourceMessage.text: My date of birth is [20/05/1996]. Using global events, cultural changes, and generational psychology, describe the most common childhood experiences of people born during this period.

analysis.templateText: My date of birth is {{date_of_birth}}. Using global events, cultural changes, and generational psychology, describe the most common childhood experiences of people born during this period.

runChat.title: Run: My date of birth is [20/05/1996]. Using global events,...

runUserMessage.text: My date of birth is 01/01/2001. Using global events, cultural changes, and generational psychology, describe the most common childhood experiences of people born during this period.

provenance.templateText: My date of birth is {{date_of_birth}}. Using global events, cultural changes, and generational psychology, describe the most common childhood experiences of people born during this period.
provenance.renderedPrompt: My date of birth is 01/01/2001. Using global events, cultural changes, and generational psychology, describe the most common childhood experiences of people born during this period.

runAssistantMessage.text: Generated answer for the filled reusable prompt.

privateChatReadByNonOwner.reason: private source chat is forbidden unless the viewer owns it

assistantMessageReuse.reason: V1 only reuses user text messages

invariants: runChat is private and distinct from sourceChat
runChat is not backed by a Request
runUserMessage provenance links source chat id, source message id, source user id, template, input values, and run chat id
runAssistantMessage belongs to the forked private chat
